blockingIssues: No executor module or run_tick/run/TickReport implementation exists; race sampling, conflict resolution, effects, double-write detection, commit, and saturation diagnostics remain absent.
Acceptance criteria 2-7 still have no executor tests or implementation support.
The CLI still lacks sembla run, --seed, --ticks, --population handling, per-tick fired output, and a compiled integration test.
summary: The revision produced no code changes. Existing tests pass but cover only prior PRDs; all PRD 0006 implementation blockers remain.
